title: How To Grow Your Channel As A Fitness Creator!

transcript.text: fitness niche, you're missing out on a monumental shift in this niche in 2026. The algorithm is hungry for evidence-based authority. As an example, I want you to look at Carolina Sweinski. She has fewer than 5,000 subscribers and yet she pulled in a mountain of engagement on this video female fitness influencers are lying to you. That right there is how you make a tiny channel explode by making a deep connection with your audience. As a niche is STIA because the desire is eternal, the potential is virtually limitless.
